# Persipica: Full Site Summary for LLM Consumption

Persipica helps enterprise and agency teams understand and improve AI visibility.

## Core Site Structure
The core site has been reduced to five pages:
1. Home: https://persipica.com/
2. Pulse: https://persipica.com/pulse.html
3. Resources: https://persipica.com/resources.html
4. Pricing: https://persipica.com/pricing.html
5. Contact: https://persipica.com/contact.html

## Primary Product
Persipica Pulse is the main product and the front-and-center offer on the site.

Pulse is an AI visibility monitoring product for enterprise and agency teams. It is built to answer three questions clearly:
1. Where did visibility move?
2. Why did it move?
3. What evidence supports that answer?

Pulse includes:
- monitoring across major models
- prompt-group tracking across discovery, comparison, buying-intent, and brand queries
- competitor displacement visibility
- verified citations before reporting
- prompt and response evidence history
- workspace-based reporting for one brand or multiple clients
- Slack and email alerts when thresholds are crossed

## Supporting Offers

### AI Presence Audit
The AI Presence Audit is the baseline option for teams that do not yet understand their current AI visibility. It is a one-off diagnostic that identifies where a brand is omitted from AI shortlists, how competitors are displacing it, and what should change first.

Typical use:
- establish a first benchmark
- understand stage-level gaps
- decide whether ongoing monitoring in Pulse is the next step

### Implementation Support
Implementation support exists for teams that want help acting on the audit. This can include content restructuring, entity clarity improvements, and authority-signal work after the baseline is known.

## Positioning
Persipica is deliberately positioned away from generic AI mention monitoring.

The core distinction is:
- mention monitoring tells you that the brand appeared
- Persipica focuses on whether the brand is present in the prompts that shape shortlists, how strong that presence is, and which evidence supports the reading

## Resource Strategy
The main site is intentionally lean. Long-form educational material is referenced from the Resources page rather than spread across the main navigation.

Resources currently point to:
- GEO guide: https://learn.persipica.com/geo-guide.html
- Audit scope: https://learn.persipica.com/what-an-audit-includes.html
- AI mention tracking guide: https://learn.persipica.com/track-ai-brand-mentions.html
- ROI calculator: https://learn.persipica.com/ai-visibility-roi-calculator.html

## Pricing Summary
The pricing page is structured around a simple stack:
1. Persipica Pulse as the default route for ongoing monitoring
2. AI Presence Audit as the baseline diagnostic
3. Implementation support as scoped follow-on help

The page is designed to make the buying path clearer by centering the product first and keeping supporting options brief.

## Contact Summary
The contact page is optimized for three actions:
1. book a Pulse walkthrough
2. ask for the AI Presence Audit
3. send enough brand context for an initial read

Contact channels:
- Contact page: https://persipica.com/contact.html
- Calendly: https://calendly.com/persipica
- Email: ilkan@persipica.com
